assertions.description: navigator.hid is exposed on the main thread.
HID.getDevices and HID.requestDevice are exposed on the main thread.
HIDDevice is exposed for devices returned by WebHID.
Dedicated Worker is available as the worker context that now exposes WebHID.
navigator.hid and HID.getDevices are exposed inside a dedicated worker.
assertions.test: (()=>new Promise(resolve=>{const blob=new Blob(['postMessage({hid:typeof navigator.hid,getDevices:typeof navigator.hid?.getDevices})'],{type:'text/javascript'});const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);const worker=new Worker(url);worker.onmessage=e=>{const ok=e.data.hid==='object'&&e.data.getDevices==='function';worker.terminate();URL.revokeObjectURL(url);resolve(ok);};worker.onerror=()=>{worker.terminate();URL.revokeObjectURL(url);resolve(false);};setTimeout(()=>{worker.terminate();URL.revokeObjectURL(url);resolve(false);},3000);}))()
